params.referrerNodeId: The node ID of the referrer.

params.streakDays: The streak length reported by LifeRewards.

params.amount: Amount of TRUST to add to the pool.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claimFirstPurchaseBonus().notice: Claim first-purchase bonus (10 TRUST). Verified via Marketplace.

claimFirstSkillBonus().notice: Claim first-skill bonus (50 TRUST). Verified via SkillRegistry.

claimFirstValidationBonus().notice: Claim first-validation bonus (25 TRUST). Verified via ValidationRegistry.

claimReferralBonus(bytes32).notice: Claim referral bonus. Referrer gets 15 TRUST, new user gets 10 TRUST.

claimStarter().notice: Claim one-time starter bonus (10 TRUST). Must be a registered node.

claimStreakBonus(uint8).notice: Claim streak bonus (5 TRUST per completed 7-day streak).

fundPool(uint256).notice: Fund the rewards pool. Caller must have approved this contract.

poolBalance().notice: Current TRUST balance available for rewards.
